exploration_notes: Traced the full admission webhook processing chain across kubernetes and api repos. The chain starts at Plugin.Admit()/Plugin.Validate() in the mutating/validating plugin.go files, which call generic.Webhook.Dispatch() in generic/webhook.go. This fetches hooks from the Source and delegates to the type-specific Dispatcher interface (defined in generic/interfaces.go). The mutating dispatcher (mutating/dispatcher.go) processes hooks sequentially with reinvocation logic tracked via webhookReinvokeCo
